Awards and Achievements
• Solved 300+ coding problems across platforms: LeetCode, Codeforces, and GeeksforGeeks.
• JEE Mains 2022: Secured AIR 4778 (99.5 percentile) among 872,970 students and cleared JEE Advanced.
• Indian National Physics Olympiad (INPhO): Ranked in the top 5% nationally (High Distinction).
• Chess.com Legend: Achieved Legend Title after 200+ hours of strategic gameplay.

project_1_description:
Architectedandprogressivelyrefinedaseriesofmodelsfordeceptiondetection,beginningwithaBi-LSTMbaseline and advancing to a final hybrid architecture that fused a Transformer text encoder with a Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) to model the game’s social dynamics.
Preprocessed a dataset of over 17,000 messages, using down-sampling to address class imbalance, and attaining 85.8% accuracy with a 0.60 Macro F1-score on the held-out test set.
project_2_title: Watch-Tower S3R: Real-Time Video Anomaly Detection
project_2_description:
Incorporated LoRA and quantization to a Self-Supervised Sparse Representation (S3R) model paired with an I3D feature extractor, reaching a frame-level AUC of 83.5% on the UCF-Crime dataset.
Cut model inference time by over 28% (from 1.20s to 0.86s) by optimizing the attention mechanism bottleneck, with the system’s capabilities demonstrated through a full-stack application with a live monitoring dashboard.
project_3_description:
Designed and built a custom Linux shell in C, implementing robust command execution, persistent command history, auto-completion, and advanced signal handling.
Mastered core OS concepts by implementing a priority-based CPU scheduler to optimize process management, alongside systems for process control (fork, exec), file I/O, and Inter-Process Communication (IPC).
project_4_description:
Built a responsive, full-stack e-commerce platform featuring robust user authentication, cart management, order history, and an administrator dashboard, which led to an 88% task success rate in user testing.
Applied a normalized SQL database schema and implemented rigorous transaction controls that safeguarded data integrity by eliminating 100% of concurrency conflicts during high-traffic simulations.
project_5_description:
EngineeredaStickHerocloneusingJava, JavaFX,andSceneBuilderwitharesponsiveUIandsmoothanimation.
Improved player retention by 20% through optimized mechanics and user experience.
Used Singleton and Factory design patterns, leveraging multithreading for 10+ concurrent animations and ensuring reliability with JUnit tests that achieved 90% path coverage.
indproj_1_professor: Prof. Raghava Mutharaju (IIIT-Delhi) and Suman Roy (Oracle)
indproj_1_description:
Devised a novel R-BERT pipeline, surpassing LLaMA-3, Mistral, and GPT-3 performance on biomedical datasetsby6%inF1-score,usingspan-basedembeddingsandnegativesamplingforenhancedrelationextraction.
Mined relationships between 25,000+ biomedical entities using a novel R-BERT pipeline, resulting in a 20% reduction in false positives during complex query interpretation for clinical trial matching.
work_1_description:
Led the end-to-end creation of a Transformer-based Q&A model, mitigating hallucinations, resulting in 95% factual accuracy while using 8-bit quantization and LORA to cut model size by 75% and double inference speed.
Architected and deployed a scalable full-stack application using FastAPI, Docker, and React.js to handle 100+ concurrent requests, integrating a layout-aware OCR pipeline that improved text extraction accuracy by 15%.
